rulings.Case Title: LAURA ESMERALDA CONTRERAS VS. CAROL BUTERWORTH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Steven Stuart'S Demurrer To 3rd Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 15, 2013, line 1. Defendant Steven Stuart'S Demurrer To 3rd Amended Complaint DENY/OVERRULE as to third amended complaint because moot. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LAURA ESMERALDA CONTRERAS VS. CAROL BUTERWORTH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Fourth Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 15, 2013, line 1. PLAINTIFF LAURA CONTRERAS' Motion For Leave To File Fourth Amended Complaint GRANT with leave to amend. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LAURA ESMERALDA CONTRERAS VS. CAROL BUTERWORTH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Special Motion To Strike Complaint And Motion To Strike Irrelevant Matter
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 15, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANT STEVEN STUART'S Special Motion To Strike Complaint And Motion To Strike Irrelevant Matter DENY - Court of Appeal has determined likelihood of prevailing and voracity not proper determination at this stage. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NARCISO S HILO III VS. FIRST FINANCIAL LENDER et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 15, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANTS MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., CITIBANK, N.A., AS TRUSTEE FOR CERTIFICATEHOLDERS, BEAR STERNS ALT-A TRUST, MORTGAGE PASS* THROUGH CERTIFICATES, SERIES 2007-2, EMC MORTGAGE LLC, FORMERLY KNOWN AS EMC MORTGAGE'S DEMURRER TO 5TH AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAIN without leave to amend. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 15, 2013, line 4. Defendants' Amended Demurrer To Plaintiff'S Complaint SUSTAIN with leave to amend and address issue raised in demurrer. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JAVIER CORTES et al VS. GMAC MORTGAGE, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 15, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT GMAC MORTGAGE, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAIN without leave to amend. No notice of default, defective or otherwise existed on or before October 11, 2012. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HEATHER DANIELS VS. MERIDIAN FORECLOSURE SERVICE, FKA MTDS INC., et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 15, 2013, line 6. DEFENDANTS DEUTSCHE BANK NATIOAL TRUST COMPANY, ONEWEST BANK, FSB (ERRONEOUSLY USED AS INDYMAC)'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings DENY as to 1st and 4th cause of action 2923.5 sufficiently alleged. GRANT with leave to amend as to 2nd cause of action fraud to allege facts re successor liability and statute of limitation, see Alfaro v. Community Housing 171 Cal.App 1356. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HEATHER DANIELS VS. MERIDIAN FORECLOSURE SERVICE, FKA MTDS INC., et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 15, 2013, line 6. Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction DENY preliminary injunction: (1) defendant presents evidence of due diligence compliance uncontroverted by plaintiff's declaration see paragraph 25; (2) plaintiff present no evidence re due diligence discovering fraud and breach of fiduciary duty and plaintiff admits receiving documents in 2007 and no evidence of ability to tender: (3) plaintiff presents no evidence loan is under modification review. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOVICA MAKSIMOVIC et al VS. BANK OF AMERICA N.A. RECONTRUST et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 15, 2013, line 7. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE Re Preliminary Injunction Hearing required to address foreclosure sale and why order to show cause re contempt should not be set for violating court issued temporary restraining order on January 31, 2013 with notice served February 1, 2013 and address rescinding sale. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CARDIOVASCULAR ASSOCIATES RETIREMENT PLAN VS. RICHARD LOHR DBA AUTO 360 et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 15, 2013, line 8. DEFENDANT RICHARD LOHR DBA AUTO 360'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND GRANT - time runs from notice of entry of order plus CCP 1013, five additional days; therefore, default is premature CCP 473d. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MITCH KEIL et al VS. RALPH SILBERMAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Answers, Without Objections To Form As To Pltf'S Special Interrogatories Set No 1 Against Deft Ralph Silberman
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 15, 2013, line 9. PLAINTIFFS MITCH KEIL and MARY KEIL'S Motion For Order Compelling Answers, Without Objections To Form As To Pltf'S Special Interrogatories Set No 1 Against Deft Ralph Silberman GRANT subject to opposition plus attorney and costs totaling $1,320. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALEX FLEMING VS. TIM MCCABE et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 15, 2013, line 10. DEFENDANT TIM MCCABE'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULE - 5 days to answer. Notice sufficiently alleges non curable violation subject to CCP 1161(4). = (501/REQ)
